name: No-Bake Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the sugar, cocoa powder, milk, and butter. Heat over medium until boiling.
2. Remove from heat and let cool for 1 minute.
3. Pour mixture into a mixing bowl.
4. Add peanut butter, vanilla extract, and oatmeal to the bowl.
5. Spread the mixture evenly in an 8x8 inch square pan.
6. Refrigerate until hardened.
7. Cut into squares and serve.
